name: Fat-Free Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, oats, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the dry mixture and stir until all ingredients are moistened. The dough will be thick.
3. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of dough onto a baking sheet sprayed with cooking spray (or greased).
4. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for eight to ten minutes, or until set. Do not overbake.
5. Let the cookies cool on the baking sheet for five minutes, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes about 2 1/2 dozen cookies (depending on size desired).
